question: Chapters
feedback: The text lists four main sections of the thesis: teorētiskā metode, praktiska metode, nodaļa par teorētiskajiem materiāliem un nodaļa par esošajiem modernajiem risinājumiem. However, it would be more clear if the text explicitly stated that these sections are the main chapters of the thesis.

question: Description
feedback: The text briefly describes contents of each section, but it could be more detailed and specific. For example, in the first chapter, what exactly will be analyzed in the literature review?

question: Structure
feedback: Yes, it can be easily understood from this text that the thesis has four main sections: theoretical method, practical method, analysis of existing solutions and a chapter on data structures. The text also mentions that each section will have specific contents.
